variants.title: RHR660A10B6 AB1
variants.option1Value: Filtrec RHR660A10B/2 Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec RHR660A10B6/AB1
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec RHR660A10B/2. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the RHR660A10B/2 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
